pi_items.source: Task description strictly mandates creating the conditions file at ~/PsychoPyExperiments/digit_span/digit_span_conditions.csv
Task description strictly mandates creating the experiment file at ~/PsychoPyExperiments/digit_span/digit_span.psyexp
Task description explicitly requires 'At least 24 total trials'
Task description lists exact column headers: 'span_length, digits, direction, correct_response'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to generate a PsychoPy Builder experiment from scratch. The expected output paths are ~/PsychoPyExperiments/digit_span/digit_span_conditions.csv and ~/PsychoPyExperiments/digit_span/digit_span.psyexp. The conditions file must contain at least 24 trials and exactly four columns: span_length, digits, direction, and correct_response.
